case_title: ADAM CASHMAN ET AL VS. LOURDES PORTILLO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PORTILLO, LOURDES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-20-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,795.20 FILED BY CASHMAN, ADAM SAFRIN, VIVIANE AS TO DEFENDANT PORTILLO, LOURDES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT PORTILLO, LOURDES ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $150.00- SERVED OCT-04-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PORTILLO, LOURDES
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY CASHMAN, ADAM SAFRIN, VIVIANE PORTILLO, LOURDES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASHMAN, ADAM SAFRIN, VIVIANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PORTILLO, LOURDES $3,370.20 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,595.20, AWARD INCLUDES STATUTORY DAMAGES AUTHORIZED BY CIVIL CODE 1950.5 (L) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
